metadata._readme: Hand-curated POI overrides. This file is YOURS — `npm run bake:poi` merges it on top of the OSM and Google sources and never overwrites it. Add restaurants (or any kind) the auto-baked data misses. A manual entry overrides an OSM/Google entry with the same `kind` + matching name within ~150m (or the same location). kind must be one of: bus-stop, restaurant, school, park. coordinates are [longitude, latitude].
